creator: i.bakirov@gmail.com
text:
Development port of haproxy /ports/net/haproxy-devel updated with release version 1.6.0, but not 1.7.-dev0 version (https://svnweb.freebsd.org/ports?view=revision&revision=399220). I think haproxy and haproxy-devel ports confused and wrong port has been updated.

haproxy-devel should be updated to 1.7-dev0
haproxy should be updated to 1.6.0 release

Upstream haproxy just released version 1.6.0 (http://git.haproxy.org/?p=haproxy.git;a=commit;h=844028bb1186ccc9f5e29388576d8a81818e4680)

Upstream haproxy development tree switched to 1.7-dev0 version (to http://git.haproxy.org/?p=haproxy.git;a=commit;h=991b47831a57602f9555a1e5cd62ea3e184fa038)
